items.line_en: I usually wake up at 7 o'clock, except on Sundays when I like to sleep in.

coach.say: I usually wake up at 7 o'clock, except on Sundays when I like to sleep in.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I usually wake up at 7 o'clock, / except on Sundays when I like to sleep in.

items.line_en: The first thing I do after getting up is of a shower.

coach.say: The first thing I do after getting up is of a shower.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The first thing I do after getting up is of a shower.

items.line_en: After my shower I get dressed and have breakfast.

coach.say: After my shower I get dressed and have breakfast.
coach.hint: Chunk it: After my shower I get dressed and / have breakfast.

items.line_en: I normally have milk and cereal with a cup of coffee.

coach.say: I normally have milk and cereal with a cup of coffee.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I normally have milk and / cereal with a cup of coffee.

items.line_en: I have finished breakfast, I always clean my teeth.

coach.say: I have finished breakfast, I always clean my teeth.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have finished breakfast, / I always clean my teeth.

items.line_en: Most days, I leave the house at 7.45, and walk to the subway station, which is 2 minutes

coach.say: Most days, I leave the house at 7.45, and walk to the subway station, which is 2 minutes
coach.hint: Chunk it: Most days, / I leave the house at 7.45, / and walk to the subway station, / which is 2 minutes

items.line_en: from my flat.

coach.say: from my flat.
coach.hint: Chunk it: from my flat.

items.line_en: I usually take the underground because it's quicker.

coach.say: I usually take the underground because it's quicker.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I usually take the underground because / it's quicker.

items.line_en: But sometimes I catch the bus.

coach.say: But sometimes I catch the bus.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But sometimes I catch the bus.

items.line_en: From 9 to 5 I work in an office.

coach.say: From 9 to 5 I work in an office.
coach.hint: Chunk it: From 9 to 5 I work in an office.

items.line_en: If I'm busy, I have a sandwich at my desk for lunch.

coach.say: If I'm busy, I have a sandwich at my desk for lunch.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If I'm busy, / I have a sandwich at my desk for lunch.

items.line_en: Otherwise I go to the nearby coffee shop with a colleague.

coach.say: Otherwise I go to the nearby coffee shop with a colleague.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Otherwise I go to the nearby coffee shop with a colleague.

items.line_en: After sitting in front of a computer screen for most of the day, I need to get some exercise.

coach.say: After sitting in front of a computer screen for most of the day, I need to get some exercise.
coach.hint: Chunk it: After sitting in front of a computer screen for most of the day, / I need to get some exercise.

items.line_en: So after work I always go to the gym.

coach.say: So after work I always go to the gym.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So after work I always go to the gym.

items.line_en: In the evening I like to relax by listening to some music with a glass of wine.

coach.say: In the evening I like to relax by listening to some music with a glass of wine.
coach.hint: Chunk it: In the evening I like to relax by listening to some music with a glass of wine.

items.line_en: I rarely go out during the week, but on Saturdays I often go to the movies with my

coach.say: I rarely go out during the week, but on Saturdays I often go to the movies with my
coach.hint: Chunk it: I rarely go out during the week, / but on Saturdays I often go to the movies with my

items.line_en: girlfriend.

coach.say: girlfriend.
coach.hint: Chunk it: girlfriend.

items.line_en: I usually go to bed at half past 10, but if I'm tired, I go to bed earlier.

coach.say: I usually go to bed at half past 10, but if I'm tired, I go to bed earlier.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I usually go to bed at half past 10, / but if I'm tired, / I go to bed earlier.

items.line_en: One thing I never do is drink coffee in the evening.

coach.say: One thing I never do is drink coffee in the evening.
coach.hint: Chunk it: One thing I never do is drink coffee in the evening.

items.line_en: It stops me from sleeping.
